generations.full_prompt:
Create a professional data visualization for a tech news publication.

VISUALIZATION TYPE: An isometric tech city features a towering "Bun 1.3.13 Data Center" and a sleek, glass "React 19.2.5 Innovation Hub" at its core. Elevated "CI/CD Pipeline Bridges" interconnect these with the "Dependency Archive Vaults" zone, where package flows are often bottlenecked, symbolized by traffic jams at bridge entrances. The city is organized into "Runtime Frameworks District" (Bun, React), "Automation & Pipeline Plaza" (CI/CD bridges), and "Dependency Management Quarter" (vaults). Labeled pathways trace software and build traffic, highlighting critical dependency install choke points in the modernization ecosystem.

CONTENT CONTEXT:
The repository is currently focused on an infrastructure modernization effort targeting Bun 1.3.13 and React 19.2.5, though CI/CD regressions are present due to dependency install failures.

STYLE: Clean isometric architecture with interconnected modular components and data flow paths. Miniature diorama feel.

REQUIREMENTS:
- Professional infographic/dashboard quality
- Clean, polished vector aesthetic
- Include section headers and labels where appropriate
- Strategic use of color to highlight key insights
- Editorial publication quality
- Modern, sophisticated design, isometric city, tech architecture, clean vector, soft shadows, modular
